publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-07-22 23:51:12 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Manuscripts, correspondence, reports, publications, notes, and other papers.
did.abstract: Manuscripts, correspondence, reports, publications, notes, and other papers concerning corn and iris breeding.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Lowell Fritz Randolph (Cornell University Ph.D. 1921) was professor of botany at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Manuscripts, correspondence, reports, publications, notes, photographs, slides, field notes, and other papers concerning corn, iris breeding and his trips to Mexico, Honduras, Guatemala, the West Indies, Europe, India, Soviet Union (USSR) and the Middle East.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Lowell Fitz Randolph papers, #21-17-1876. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Field Trip - Listing of Collections, Memos on Tripsacum
Field Trips - Mexico, Honduras and Diaries
West Indies Tripsacum - Travel plans, maps, herb. records
Iris Species and Herbarium Species Notes: India and the USSR

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: handwritten notes and Correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: British Museum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs and negatives

did.unittitle: Field Notes, Iris Trips and Iris Crossing Notes - Bundled

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bundles of loose handwritten notes. Includes notes from Boston(1949), England(1950 and 1959), St. Louis(1952), Indiana(1953), Lousiana(1964), Mexico, Honduras, and Guatemala(1965-1969) and Iris Crossing notes from 1947, 1948, 1949 and 1950

did.unittitle: Iris Trip Notebook - Europe(England) and Philadelphia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes. Includes trips to Florida, Washington, Adirondacks, Boston, and Nashville,

did.unittitle: Field Notes - Southwest and Mexico Trip

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes. Includes England, France, Denmark, and Sweden

did.unittitle: Iris Trip Notebook - Europe and Middle East

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes. Includes Switzerland, France. Italy, Yugoslavia, Germany, Austria, Cypress, Turkey, Lebanon, and Egypt

did.unittitle: Field Notes - California, Louisiana, Southwest, and Texas

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 6x9" notebook of handwritten notes

did.unittitle: Iris Trip Notebook - India and Soviet Union(USSR)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes. Includes N. Italy, Yugoslavia, Bulgaria, Romania, Czechoslovakia, Poland and West Germany, Canary Islands and Sinica(China)

did.unittitle: Field Notes - Mexico, Honduras and Guatamala

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pocket sized notebook of handwritten notes. Mainly from 1971-1972, also includes loose notes with later dates

did.unittitle: Draft paper by Randolph - Contributions of Wild Relatives of Maize to the Evolbutionary History of Domisticated Maize
Diagrams and photos used in book
Kato Manuscript - Text parts I and II
Kyoto University - Scientific expedition to Latin American report
Concerning Tripsacum and various trips to Guatemala, Mexico, Adirondacks, etc.
